scene_input.scene_summary: The Quraysh gather to discuss their grievances against the Prophet.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Quraysh leaders standing in a circle, pointing fingers at each other
scene_input.setting: A large gathering place in Makkah

schema_output.scene_summary: The Quraysh gather to discuss their grievances against the Prophet.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 138
schema_output.moral_lesson: The consequences of gossip and backbiting

characters.name: Quraysh leader 1
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep red woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: Quraysh leader 2
characters.appearance: slender build, slightly stooped shoulders, wearing a light gray thobe and a plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

characters.name: Quraysh leader 3
characters.appearance: tall build, upright posture, wearing a dark blue thobe with a distinctive white woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

schema_output.narrative_text: The Quraysh leaders stood in a circle, pointing fingers at each other and speaking in hushed tones. They were discussing their grievances against the Prophet, but their anger and frustration were palpable.

compliance.notes: Historically accurate depiction of the Quraysh leaders

schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A large gathering place in 7th century Makkah with high ceilings and a large open space surrounded by rows of pillars made of smooth white stone. Late afternoon golden sunlight streams through a series of narrow windows high above, casting warm rays across the room. In the center of the room stands a circle of tall men: a central figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep red woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades; on his right, a slender man seen from behind: slightly stooped shoulders, wearing a light gray thobe and a plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering; on his left, a tall man seen from behind: upright posture, wearing a dark blue thobe with a distinctive white woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades. Each man is standing with their hands extended, pointing fingers at each other, and their faces are turned slightly away from the central figure. Soft warm golden light, tense and confrontational mood. Wide shot from above looking down. Warm sand, cream, and golden palette with the deep red cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
